specific_location: West dam wall of Rose Pond , Chico Basin Ranch .
description: After previously having seen 5 or 6 Swainson's Thrush the same morning for comparison , I observed this thrush with a completely cold gray upperparts including tail with no contrast between back and upper tail , a narrower eye ring than adjacent SWTH , gray cheecks , no buffy tones at all around lores or neck , breast heavily spotted , did not get very much on the flank coloration unfortunately.Behaviors: Skulking ,kept low in willows close to the edge of Rose Pond , did not flick wings or cock tail which is a characteristic of Hermit Thrush.Call: No call or song heardPlumage: Adult
